title: Amsterdam, NH — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Amsterdam is a city in NH with a population of 931,298. The cosmopolitan canal capital, blending historic charm with a world-class cultural scene and the country’s highest cost of living.
